homepage.heroSubline: Reliable repairs and installations for your home or business. Serving Bakersfield and the surrounding areas.
aboutText: FixDoors Garage Inc. has been serving the Bakersfield community for over a decade. We started as a small, family-owned business with a simple goal: to provide honest, reliable garage door services at a fair price.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to our customers, diagnose the problem accurately, and provide efficient solutions. We value integrity and transparency in every job we undertake, ensuring you understand the process and the cost upfront.

We're proud to be a part of the Bakersfield community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to contribute to the well-being of our neighbors. When you choose FixDoors Garage Inc., you're supporting a local business that cares.

valueProps.title: Fast Response Times
valueProps.description: We understand the urgency of a malfunctioning garage door. Expect prompt service and quick resolutions.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team consists of highly trained and certified technicians with years of experience in the field.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: No hidden fees or surprises. We provide clear and transparent pricing before any work begins.

valueProps.title: Quality Workmanship
valueProps.description: We use only high-quality parts and materials to ensure lasting repairs and reliable performance.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact us now for a quick and accurate assessment of your garage door needs.

services.name: Garage Door Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert repairs for all types of garage door issues.
services.description:
Is your garage door making strange noises, refusing to open, or hanging crookedly? Don't wait for the problem to worsen. FixDoors Garage Inc. provides comprehensive garage door repair services in Bakersfield. From broken springs and damaged panels to faulty openers and misaligned tracks, our experienced technicians can diagnose and fix any issue quickly and efficiently.

We understand the importance of a functioning garage door for security and convenience, especially in a climate like Bakersfield where extreme heat can damage unprotected belongings. We work on all makes and models of garage doors, using high-quality replacement parts to ensure lasting repairs. Our team is equipped to handle emergency repairs, minimizing disruption to your daily routine.

Whether you live in Oleander-Sunset or a newer development further west, we'll come to you. We pride ourselves on providing prompt, reliable service and transparent pricing. Get your garage door back in top shape with FixDoors Garage Inc.
process: Step 1: Inspection and Diagnosis: We thoroughly inspect your garage door to identify the root cause of the problem.
Step 2: Transparent Quote: We provide a detailed and upfront quote for the necessary repairs.
Step 3: Expert Repair: Our skilled technicians perform the repairs using high-quality parts and proven techniques.
Step 4: Testing and Verification: We test the door to ensure smooth and reliable operation after the repair.
benefits: Reduced Repair Costs in the Long Run

faq.question: How long does a typical garage door repair take?
faq.answer: Most repairs can be completed within a few hours, depending on the complexity of the issue. We'll provide an estimated timeframe during the initial assessment.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we understand that garage door problems can arise at any time. We offer 24/7 emergency repair services to address urgent issues promptly.

faq.question: What types of garage doors do you repair?
faq.answer: We repair all types of garage doors, including sectional, roll-up, and tilt-up doors. We also work on various brands and models of garage door openers.

services.name: Garage Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of new garage doors for homes and businesses.
services.description:
Looking to upgrade your home's curb appeal or improve security? FixDoors Garage Inc. offers professional garage door installation services in Bakersfield. We carry a wide selection of high-quality garage doors from leading manufacturers, including steel, wood, and aluminum options. Our experienced team can help you choose the perfect door to match your style, budget, and functional needs.

We understand that garage door styles vary across Bakersfield neighborhoods. Whether you want a classic look for your home near the Crystal Palace or a modern design for a newer build, we can help. Our installation process is meticulous, ensuring proper alignment, smooth operation, and long-lasting performance. We also handle all necessary wiring and programming for your new garage door opener.

From initial consultation to final inspection, we're committed to providing a seamless and stress-free installation experience. We'll remove your old door, prepare the opening, install the new door, and clean up the job site, leaving you with a beautiful and functional garage door.
process: Step 1: Consultation and Selection: We help you choose the right garage door based on your needs and preferences.
Step 2: Precise Measurement: We take accurate measurements to ensure a perfect fit.
Step 3: Professional Installation: Our skilled technicians install the door with precision and care.
Step 4: Testing and Adjustment: We test and adjust the door to ensure smooth and reliable operation.

faq.question: How long does a garage door installation take?
faq.answer: A typical garage door installation takes about 4-6 hours, depending on the complexity of the installation and the type of door.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your garage door installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on our garage door installations, covering both parts and labor. Details vary by manufacturer.

faq.question: Can you install a garage door opener with my new door?
faq.answer: Yes, we can install a new garage door opener along with your new door. We offer a variety of openers to suit your needs and budget.

services.name: Garage Door Opener Repair
services.shortDescription: Fixing all brands of garage door openers in Bakersfield.
services.description:
A malfunctioning garage door opener can be a major inconvenience and security risk. FixDoors Garage Inc. specializes in garage door opener repair in Bakersfield, addressing issues such as remote control problems, motor failures, and safety sensor malfunctions. Our technicians are experienced in working with all major brands of garage door openers, including Chamberlain, LiftMaster, Genie, and more.

We understand the importance of a properly functioning safety system, especially with Bakersfield's hot climate making manual operation difficult. We'll thoroughly inspect your opener to identify the problem and provide a cost-effective solution. Whether it's a simple adjustment or a complete motor replacement, we'll get your garage door opener working smoothly again.

We pride ourselves on our quick response times and efficient service. We know that a broken garage door opener can disrupt your daily routine, so we strive to provide same-day service whenever possible. We'll diagnose the problem, explain the repair options, and get your garage door opener back in working order quickly and efficiently.
process: Step 1: Diagnosis: We identify the cause of the opener malfunction.
Step 2: Repair Options: We present you with clear repair options and pricing.
Step 3: Skilled Repair: We perform the necessary repairs with precision.
Step 4: Safety Check: We ensure all safety features are functioning correctly.

faq.question: How do I know if my garage door opener needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include the door not opening or closing properly, unusual noises, or the remote control not working. If you notice any of these issues, it's best to call a professional for an inspection.

faq.question: Can you repair my garage door opener if it's an older model?
faq.answer: Yes, we can often repair older models. However, if the parts are no longer available, we can recommend a suitable replacement.

faq.question: How often should I have my garage door opener serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend having your garage door opener serviced annually to ensure smooth operation and prevent costly repairs. Regular maintenance can help extend the lifespan of your opener.

services.name: Garage Door Spring Replacement
services.shortDescription: Safe and reliable garage door spring replacement services.
services.description:
Broken garage door springs are a common problem, especially in Bakersfield's climate where temperature fluctuations can weaken the metal. Attempting to replace garage door springs yourself can be dangerous due to the high tension involved. FixDoors Garage Inc. offers safe and reliable garage door spring replacement services, ensuring your door operates smoothly and safely.

Whether you have torsion springs or extension springs, our experienced technicians have the tools and expertise to handle the job correctly. We use only high-quality replacement springs designed for long-lasting performance. We'll ensure the springs are properly balanced and tensioned to prevent further damage to your garage door system. 

Don't risk injury or further damage to your garage door. Call FixDoors Garage Inc. for professional garage door spring replacement services. We'll get your door back in working order quickly and safely.
process: Step 1: Safety Assessment: We assess the situation and ensure a safe working environment.
Step 2: Spring Removal: We carefully remove the broken springs.
Step 3: Spring Installation: We install new, high-quality springs.
Step 4: Tension Adjustment: We adjust the spring tension for optimal performance.

faq.question: How do I know if my garage door springs are broken?
faq.answer: Common signs include a loud snapping noise, the door not opening or closing properly, or the door appearing lopsided. Never attempt to operate a garage door with broken springs.

faq.question: How long do garage door springs typically last?
faq.answer: Garage door springs typically last for 7-10 years, depending on usage and maintenance. Regular lubrication can help extend their lifespan.

faq.question: What is the difference between torsion springs and extension springs?
faq.answer: Torsion springs are mounted above the garage door opening, while extension springs are located on either side of the door. Torsion springs are generally considered to be more durable and safer than extension springs.

services.name: Garage Door Cable Repair
services.shortDescription: Fixing frayed, snapped, or loose garage door cables.
services.description:
Garage door cables play a crucial role in the safe and efficient operation of your garage door. Over time, these cables can fray, snap, or become loose, causing the door to malfunction or even become a safety hazard. FixDoors Garage Inc. provides expert garage door cable repair services in Bakersfield, ensuring your door operates smoothly and safely.

Our experienced technicians can quickly diagnose cable problems and provide effective solutions. We use only high-quality replacement cables designed for durability and long-lasting performance. We'll properly tension the cables to ensure balanced door movement and prevent further damage to your garage door system.

Don't risk operating a garage door with damaged cables. Call FixDoors Garage Inc. for professional garage door cable repair services. We'll get your door back in working order quickly and safely, giving you peace of mind.
process: Step 1: Inspection: We carefully inspect the cables for damage.
Step 2: Cable Replacement: We replace frayed or broken cables with high-quality replacements.
Step 3: Tension Adjustment: We adjust the cable tension for balanced operation.
Step 4: Safety Check: We ensure the door operates safely and smoothly.

faq.question: What are the signs of a damaged garage door cable?
faq.answer: Common signs include frayed or broken cables, the door not opening or closing evenly, or the door appearing lopsided.

faq.question: Can I replace garage door cables myself?
faq.answer: Replacing garage door cables can be dangerous due to the high tension involved. It's best to call a professional for cable replacement.

faq.question: How often should I have my garage door cables inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your garage door cables inspected annually to ensure they are in good condition. Regular lubrication can help extend their lifespan.

services.name: Off-Track Garage Door Repair
services.shortDescription: Getting your garage door back on track safely and efficiently.
services.description:
A garage door that has come off its tracks is a serious problem that requires immediate attention. Attempting to force the door back on track yourself can cause further damage and even pose a safety risk. FixDoors Garage Inc. specializes in off-track garage door repair in Bakersfield, providing safe and efficient solutions.

Our experienced technicians can quickly diagnose the cause of the problem and get your door back on track without causing further damage. We'll inspect the tracks, rollers, and other components to identify any underlying issues. We'll then carefully realign the door and ensure it operates smoothly and safely.

Don't risk further damage or injury. Call FixDoors Garage Inc. for professional off-track garage door repair services. We'll get your door back on track quickly and efficiently, restoring the security and convenience of your garage.
process: Step 1: Safety Assessment: We assess the situation and ensure a safe working environment.
Step 2: Track Inspection: We inspect the tracks for damage or misalignment.
Step 3: Door Realignment: We carefully realign the door within the tracks.
Step 4: Component Repair: We repair or replace any damaged components.

faq.question: What causes a garage door to go off track?
faq.answer: Common causes include damaged tracks, broken rollers, or an obstruction in the door's path.

faq.question: Can I try to fix an off-track garage door myself?
faq.answer: Attempting to fix an off-track garage door yourself can be dangerous due to the weight of the door and the potential for further damage. It's best to call a professional for assistance.

faq.question: How much does it cost to repair an off-track garage door?
faq.answer: The cost of repairing an off-track garage door varies depending on the extent of the damage and the necessary repairs. We offer free estimates for all of our services.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: My garage door wouldn't open, and I was worried about leaving my car outside overnight. FixDoors Garage Inc. came out quickly and fixed the broken spring. The technician was professional and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: We recently upgraded our garage door, and FixDoors Garage Inc. did a great job. The installation was smooth, and the new door looks fantastic. There was a minor delay due to weather, but they communicated well throughout the process.

reviews.name: Linda K.
reviews.text: Our garage door opener stopped working, and we couldn't get our cars out. FixDoors Garage Inc. came out the same day and repaired the motor. The technician was knowledgeable and efficient. Great service!

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: I had a broken garage door spring and called FixDoors Garage Inc. They were very responsive and replaced the spring quickly and safely. The price was reasonable, and the technician was friendly and professional.

reviews.name: Susan L.
reviews.text: The cable on my garage door snapped, and the door was hanging crookedly. FixDoors Garage Inc. came out and replaced the cable. The service was quick and efficient. I would use them again.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: My garage door came off its tracks after I accidentally bumped into it with my car. FixDoors Garage Inc. came out and got it back on track quickly and safely. I was very impressed with their service.
